cases.description: Session-start resume request triggers the skill
cases.prompt: what were we working on yesterday? catch me up
expectations: Reads the latest 5 entries from docs/CONTROL.json (not the whole file)
Summarizes current project state and last in-progress task
Mentions any pending blockers from previous sessions
Activates daily-log skill in resume mode

cases.description: End-of-day summary request triggers the skill
cases.prompt: let's wrap up — log today's work
expectations: Activates daily-log skill in log mode
Writes a new entry under 300 chars
Adds the entry at the BEGINNING of docs/CONTROL.json (latest on top)
References decisions, PRs, or files touched this session

cases.description: Writing a commit message does NOT trigger daily-log
cases.prompt: write a commit message for the auth changes

cases.description: Architecture doc request does NOT trigger daily-log
cases.prompt: write an ADR for the database sharding decision
